title: kerria japonica f. stellata
intro: Kerria japonica f. stellata, also known as the Rose of Japan or Stellata Kerria, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kerria japonica f. stellata include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
